pageContext.name: Edge of Spider-Verse #2 Facsimile Edition
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dynamic Forces are excited to present the Edge of Spider-Verse #2 Facsimile Edition CGC Graded Comic Book!  Introducing Gwen Stacy, the Spider-Woman of Earth-65 - one of the most sensational web-slingers in the entire Spider-Verse!  In the atmospheric, neon-lit world envisioned by Jason Latour and Robbi Rodriguez, Peter Parker wasn't bitten by a radioactive spider - but Gwen Stacy was! Now 'Spider-Gwen' is smart, charming, and able to lift a car - just don't tell her police chief father.  What happened to Peter in this reality? Why does everybody hate Spider-Woman so much? And can Gwen find time to battle the Rhino and make it back in time to play drums in a major gig for her band, the Mary Janes?! A modern superhero icon makes her debut right here!  It's one of the all-time great Marvel comic books, boldly re-presented in its original form, ads and all! Reprinting EDGE OF SPIDER-VERSE #2. CGC GRADED 9.6 OR HIGHER! Don't miss your chance to add this comic book to your Spider-Verse collection today!
